svg.title: Model Card Comparison Surface Redraw
svg.desc: An original schematic for comparing model-card and technical-report surfaces without collapsing them into rankings.
svg.text: Model cards are disclosure surfaces, not scoreboards
Source lane: S-0110 and open-model reports. Original comparison grid; no model-card table is copied.

g.text: Comparison fields that travel with a model-card or technical-report exhibit
model card, technical report, launch post, repository, or benchmark page
version, release date, cutoff status, and whether later addenda exist
training/eval/safety/license details that are actually stated
private data, exact deployment, costs, adoption, incidents, or undisclosed evals
no rank, safety proof, openness proof, adoption proof, or price-quality conclusion
Use as a surface-comparison template, not as a cross-lab ranking table.
